reviews.review_description: This game is unusable: you get stuck right in the tutorial. I deeply regret buying it, especially since getting a refund is impossible. In the end, $8 wasted.

When launching Black Hole Pool Lite, another game, Black Hole Pool starts instead: but it's not the complete game, just the starting single player room. No way to reach the elevator to change it. It's almost impossibile to move around. The game gives me the impression it is not supported anymore, but it's still on sale anyway.

reviews.review_title: Absolutely fantastic until meta v60 os
reviews.review_description:
This deserves more stars. It's absolutely brilliant.

Movement is smooth, can adjust table height, the ball sets are beautiful and the physics are spot on 
The best pool game I've played in vr. 
Got this as I don't play multiplayer and it's worth every penny. 
Must buy if you like pool. Other version is £15 pound so to get the offline version for less that £5 is brilliant.

Must get this if you haven't got it yet

Update.  V60 of quest OS has broken this. Try to aim for a shot and the rear end of cue does it's own thing and drops down and won't read the cue movement correctly. 
The new algorithm for predicting where you hands are little behind you is terrible.

Dropped more stars because the Devs don't respond to emails.

Update, finally got repose weeks later

Meta update v62 seemed to fix the issue I was having.

developer_response.body:
Hi OversizeWizard,

Sorry to hear that you are having issues. Unfortunately, if Meta broke something in v60 OS update, we can not fix it. Only Meta can.

reviews.review_description:
purchased the original black hole pool back when it was on app lab. On this I had  some instances of playing against my friends which was cool and also against  the AI once or twice but ultimately I would just go into it and pott balls on my own while watching you tube. Bhp is a fantastic game so I decided to get this even though it is a 'lite' version '. I have largely  pros about this version and 2xcons  which I can overlook.


1- there are 4 new environments. The apartment loft is particularly appealing to me


2 it feels a bit more zippy to navigate around and position yourself. This is with the right thumb stick - see below for con re this. 


3- the balls and physics are very good. Perhaps improved. Very satisfying and realistic. 


4- you tube. I hope this doesn't come back to bite me on the anus  but in this version, which looks like more of an official release,  I have been prepared to log into my you tube account which allows for better viewing of my stuff. More enjoyable. So far so good. 



Cons


1 The big one which detracts from it being really  perfect. The left thumb stick does dot behave in same way as before for positioning.. Before I used both sticks to move and fine tune position particularly when I needed to avoid hitting the guardian barrier. However in this version the left stick  does behave this so pushing forward doesn't mean you always love forward - it can send you any other direction and it changes all the time depending on the moves you made . I can live with this as per point 2 above but I hope this gets fixed. 



2 the screen on you tube doesn't seem as vibrant as on the previous version I bought and perhaps the sounds is not quite as good also. 



All in lts with spending another $6 for what seems like a more refined one player experience. 


Now I  can't wait until there is a proper released version with codec avatars, 2 player you tube watching and snooker. 


Developers please make this happen and take my money. BHP is basically the bees knees! (v good).

This game is chill. The AI could use a buff. The youtube video is great. The brightness could use a little buff too. If you aren’t into multiplayer I would recommend this for sure. The full version is great for hanging with friends or competing.

I love this game, thank you for bringing this app with new enviroments ! Hope to see more ! 

Hopefully a snooker version too ! :-)

Im thinking this lite version isnt working anymore cant get past the tutorial.and everytime i switch rooms i have to start all over again once you hit the first ball in it doesnt do anything after that cool rooms though
Thanks Devs! Great game! Snooker, with a real Snooker table would be awesome.
